tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: We need to _________ our bags the night before the trip so we don't forget anything.
The plane will _________ at 8 o'clock in the morning, so we have to get up early.
Dad showed our _________ to the lady at the airport check-in desk.
We put on _________ and went swimming as soon as we got to the beach.
Every morning on holiday I _________ at seven, have breakfast and go to the pool.
Mum bought some _________ for our friends — a magnet and a small keyring from Greece.
